name: Romance Next Door
overview: Cheng Lele, having offended her boss, is secretly demoted and returns to her hometown to manage the struggling Xingchen Cinema. Unexpectedly, she reunites with her ex-boyfriend Chen An, and their new circumstances lead to a series of comedic situations. Together, they navigate their relationship and the challenges of reviving the cinema.

trailers.title: 创意先导视频：平安喜乐，在下雨天重新开始【兄友妹恭 Peace and Joy】
